name: K. Trevor Wilson
bio: K. Trevor Wilson is a Canadian stand-up comedian, writer, and actor known for laid-back, observational material and a distinctive bearded look. He won the Irwin Barker Home Grown Award at the 2012 Just for Laughs Festival, and his albums SexCop Fire Penis and Sorry A Canadian Album both topped the iTunes Comedy Charts. He is also widely known for playing Squirrely Dan on the series Letterkenny.

timeline.ev: Wins the Irwin Barker Home Grown Award at Just for Laughs
Debut album SexCop Fire Penis wins Best Taped Live Performance
Begins playing Squirrely Dan on the series Letterkenny
First special Bigger in Person debuts on The Comedy Network
Featured in the Netflix series Comedians of the World

accolades: Irwin Barker Home Grown Award, Just for Laughs 2012
Best Taped Live Performance, Canadian Comedy Awards 2015
Juno Award nomination for Comedy Album of the Year

bits.t: I Have 2 Rabbits That Don't Like Each Other
Living With a Disgusting Pig Man
Cap'n Crunch Is Worse In Canada
